problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
